analysis.markdown:
The image displays a confusion matrix evaluating a classification model. The matrix compares 'True label' (rows) against 'Predicted label' (columns) for two classes: 'Alzheimer + Frontotemporal Disease' and 'Healthy'.

| | Predicted: Alzheimer + Frontotemporal Disease | Predicted: Healthy |
| :--- | :---: | :---: |
| **True: Alzheimer + Frontotemporal Disease** | 2981 | 2 |
| **True: Healthy** | 7 | 1589 |

The matrix uses a color-coded heatmap where darker blue indicates higher values. The diagonal elements (2981 and 1589) represent correct classifications, while the off-diagonal elements (2 and 7) represent misclassifications.
